item.description: 4-SEW Log 2023-06-06 gRPC gRPC, ProtoBuf, Definition and End-to-End Implementation of a Service with one Method 2023-06-13 GraphQL GraphQL with HotChocolate End-to-End Server and Client 2023-06-20 GraphQL > Mutations Adding mutations to modify data GraphQL > Subscriptions Subscriptions for live updates via push notifications from a server via websockets.
